Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Continued To Nov-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (414 Lakeview Str. S.F.)
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sammie Dukes for Valerie Dow-Green.

The Court stated that there are procedural issues with the notice of hearing not being served on the proposed buyers and the funds going into one blocked account when they will need to be spread out over several banks. Mr. Dukes reported that there was a problem with the scanning of the notice of hearing and provided the court with an endorsed filed copy which showed service to the buyers and that they will be depositing the funds into multiple banks which will be reflected in the order. The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $652,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed on 5/5/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sammie Dukes for and with Valerie Dow-Green. Several other family members present as well.

The Court raised the issue of waiver of bond or the administrator serving with limited authority. Mr. Dukes stated that the heirs waive bond and are in agreement, but that limited powers is fine. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with limited powers (subject to review of the order). The Court informed the Parties that any authority to sell real property will need to be approved. Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Continued To Nov-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
